title: Fooductive: Additions
description: New Ways to Cook with my own style?
body:
<details>
<summary>Optional Mods</summary>

- JEI (https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

</details>



Firstly, I want to apologize, that it took so long but, Im a single man doing this, but its here. Fooductive 2.2, a revolutionary update in this mod, ones we all needed. 


<details>
<summary>FIXED in 2.2.1</summary>

BTW, if the game can't load any worlds, I found the solution, you need to install my other mod, idk why :(

</details>



# What's new?
> **Blocks**
- Mango Block
- Pear Block
- Orange Block
- Tea can - block side


- Pear leaves
- Orange leaves
> **Items**
- Key
- Blocked Rice
- Corn seeds
- Chilli seeds
- Chilli
- Tomato seeds
- Strawberry seeds
- Banana seeds

> Important
- New Features
- Removed Dreams
- New ways of making Food
- Updated languages - means English and German are more grammar

# So why do I find this Update so important?
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. because, the plants work now how they should,
2. because, I updated the models, textures and the functions of the mod
3. update things :)

</details>

Let me explain, what Mango Block, Pear or Orange Block means, it means, when u find a tree, it has a fruit on it, a fruit block. 

![Mango Fruit Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82e08bbc3a6403395dc54c2c119e1906549ad0f7.png)

You want to know how to get rice?
smack a fern or a block tagged under "minecraft:grass "into a stone

**Let me also explain what the new feautres are, they are:**
1. automated recipes
2. when u try to fry something, (only cut potato rn), its starts a timer that counts from 100 down to 0, but if you try to pull out at at least under 20, you get it, but if not :(
2. ok that's it for the feautres :(


<details>
<summary>hehe</summary>

jk, added blending and mixing the teas and honey in the tea can block ;)

</details>


# Next Update is 2.3.1
